message: Hi, is the Dubai Hills villa still available? I'm cash-ready and want to view this week.
bot_response:
Hi Adam. I'm Dalya from Mahoroba Realty.

Just to confirm, are you asking about the Golf Grove villa I sent over (3-bed corner, AED 7.5M), or a different property in Dubai Hills Estate? I want to make sure we're on the same page before we arrange a viewing.
